title: Brachyphragma serenoi
taxonomy: Brachyphragma serenoi is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is native to Kenya and can be found in the alpine meadows and rocky areas of the Mount Kenya region. Brachyphragma serenoi is classified as an annual plant, which means it completes its life cycle in a year. Its classification also includes being a hemiparasitic plant, which means it obtains some of its nutrients from the surrounding environment, typically through parasitism. Brachyphragma serenoi is also a member of the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as the broomrape family.
